title: Optimistic concurrency: OccEnabled table + UpdateConflict retry loop
instruction: In the sandbox model, demonstrate optimistic concurrency control. Create: (1) a table DemoCounter with OccEnabled=Yes, a unique primary index on field CounterName (str) and a field CounterValue (int); (2) a class DemoCounterBump with a static method increment(str _name) that, inside ttsbegin/ttscommit, selects forupdate the matching DemoCounter and updates CounterValue, wrapped in a retry loop that catches Exception::UpdateConflict and retries per the OCC pattern. Use get_knowledge(topic="optimistic concurrency") to ground the OccEnabled / RecVersion / UpdateConflict-retry pattern. Both objects must build clean.
